element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Up to five spell attacks available by progression
Each level culminates in boss fight

typical_relief_triggers: Checkpoint completion between platforming sections and boss
Spell acquisition providing new combat options
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced action throughout; brutal gameplay with high challenge intensity

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces core mechanics (boomerangs, basic platforming) with moderate difficulty
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Spell attacks added to arsenal; enemy complexity increases
difficulty_curve.late_game: Cumulative challenge with full spell mastery required; boss encounters become demanding
notable_spikes: Each stage boss encounter represents significant difficulty spike
Fast-paced platforming sections create sustained tension

notable_level_patterns.description: Platforming progression through stage environment followed by mandatory boss battle at level conclusion
Consistent fast-paced action with brutal difficulty; maintains player engagement through challenge rather than complexity

data_quality_note: T3 tier - extracted from limited gameplay description in Wikipedia source. Detailed sequence mapping, exact timing data, and spatial architecture patterns not documented in available source. Inferences based on standard platform game design conventions and critical reception descriptions.
